magnetization.configuration.title: Magnetization Config
compass.magnetization.anomaly_empty: Compass spinning wildly — anomalous field flux.
lirm.magnetization.struck: Lightning Induced Remnant Magnetism — gear polarised %s.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.swo: Magnetized: hits yank opposite-pole armored targets toward you.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.pic: Magnetized: sneak to slowly rip nearby ferromagnetic ore out of the world.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.axe: Magnetized: chopping a log pulls nearby ferromagnetic drops toward you.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.sho: Magnetized: chance to pan trace iron / raw magnetite from loose earth.
tooltip.magnetization.tool_signature.hoe: Magnetized: sneak + right-click to dowse for ferromagnetic ore in range.
gui.magnetization.redstone_fuel_slot: Redstone power. Any redstone dust here keeps the emitter active — no external signal required.
gui.magnetization.tool_slot: Enchanted tool or book. Its enchantments (Fortune, Silk Touch, etc.) apply to drops the emitter pulls in.
gui.magnetization.armor_slot: Armor or metal tool to magnetize. The polarity buttons stamp this item with a pole.
tooltip.magnetization.electromagnet.use: Powered by redstone. Pulls nearby ships and ferromagnetic items.
tooltip.magnetization.kinetic_electromag: Powered by Create rotation. Strength scales with RPM.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_anchor.us: Locks the first ship that enters its range. Persists across reload.
tooltip.magnetization.repulsor_coil.use: Pushes ships outward in a 45° cone along its facing. Place upward for a hover pad; place sideways or down to line a propulsion tunnel.
tooltip.magnetization.tractor_beam.use: Directional pull along facing. Wrench to rotate.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_excavator: Powered by redstone (external signal or internal redstone slot). Projects a widening cone along its facing and continuously pulls every ferromagnetic block in range — each pulled block tunnels through obstructions toward the emitter, drops on arrival, and feeds adjacent inventories. Wrench to rotate; right-click for the GUI.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_plate.use: Flat ferromagnetic plate. Used as cladding.
tooltip.magnetization.field_compass.use: Right-click for the strongest field. Sneak right-click lists every active field in range.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_grapple.u: Right-click to launch toward the nearest attractive emitter (24-block range). Sneak mid-flight to cancel.
jei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.info: Items in this list are pulled by Magnetization emitters when dropped on the ground. Other mods can extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic tag.
jei.magnetization.ferromagnetic_blocks.i: Blocks in this list are ripped out of the ground by the Magnetic Excavator. Anything in their path gets pulled along too. Other mods extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic_blocks tag.
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.name: Ferromagnetic items
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic.info: Items in this list are pulled by Magnetization emitters when dropped on the ground. Other mods can extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic tag.
rei.magnetization.ferromagnetic_blocks.i: Blocks in this list are ripped out of the ground by the Magnetic Excavator. Anything in their path gets pulled along too. Other mods extend the list via the #magnetization:ferromagnetic_blocks tag.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetic_switch.us: Emits a redstone signal proportional to nearest ship's distance (8-block range).
tooltip.magnetization.permanent_magnet.u: Always-on weak field. Right-click flips polarity. Build propulsion tracks by lining up opposing magnets between world and ship.
Place adjacent to an emitter to flip its field polarity. Two inverters cancel.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetite_ingot.us: Naturally magnetic iron oxide (Fe₃O₄). Pulled by emitters straight out of your inventory.
tooltip.magnetization.raw_magnetite.use: Mined from magnetite ore. Smelt for an ingot.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetite_ore.use: Drops raw magnetite. Fortune multiplies the drop.
tooltip.magnetization.magnetite_block.us: Compact storage for magnetite ingots. Ferromagnetic in bulk.
advancement.magnetization.root.title: Magnetic North
advancement.magnetization.root.descripti: Craft a Lodestone Core — the heart of every emitter.
advancement.magnetization.full_kit.title: Aeromagnetic Engineer
advancement.magnetization.full_kit.descr: Hold every emitter in the addon at once.
advancement.magnetization.find_magnetite: Mine raw magnetite (Fe₃O₄) from a magnetite ore.
advancement.magnetization.smelt_magnetit: Smelt raw magnetite into a magnetite ingot.
advancement.magnetization.full_loadout.d: Hold a magnetite and ferromagnetic sword and pickaxe.
advancement.magnetization.dual_magnetize: Equip any metal armor piece tracked by Magnetization.
advancement.magnetization.vein_whisperer: Hold a Magnetic Excavator. Mining without lifting a finger.
advancement.magnetization.inverted_quarr: Place a Magnetic Excavator. Wrench it to face wherever the ore is.
